description: Module registry for the Medusa v2 e-commerce framework. Used by the Triage Agent to map incidents to the relevant module and codebase area.

modules.name: cart
modules.description: Manages shopping carts, line items, shipping methods, and cart completion workflows. Orchestrates the transition from cart to order.

modules.name: order
modules.description: Handles order lifecycle from creation through fulfillment, returns, exchanges, and refunds. Manages order edits and claims.

modules.name: payment
modules.description: Processes payments through provider plugins (Stripe, PayPal, etc.). Manages payment sessions, captures, refunds, and webhooks.

modules.name: product
modules.description: Manages product catalog including products, variants, options, categories, collections, tags, and types. Handles product images and metadata.

modules.name: customer
modules.description: Manages customer accounts, groups, addresses, and authentication. Supports guest customers and registered customers.

modules.name: fulfillment
modules.description: Orchestrates order fulfillment through fulfillment providers. Manages shipments, tracking, and delivery notifications.

modules.name: inventory
modules.description: Tracks product inventory levels, reservations, and stock movements across locations. Manages inventory items and stock location associations.

modules.name: pricing
modules.description: Manages product pricing including price lists, price rules, currency-specific prices, and customer-group pricing. Handles price selection logic.

modules.name: promotion
modules.description: Manages discount codes, promotions, campaign rules, and automatic promotions. Handles promotion validation and application to carts.

modules.name: region
modules.description: Manages geographic regions with associated currencies, tax rates, payment providers, and fulfillment providers. Controls regional availability.

modules.name: store
modules.description: Manages store-level configuration including name, currencies, default settings, and metadata. Provides global store context.

modules.name: user
modules.description: Manages admin users, roles, and invitations. Handles admin authentication separately from customer auth.

modules.name: auth
modules.description: Handles authentication and authorization for both admin users and customers. Supports multiple auth providers (email/password, social, API keys).

modules.name: notification
modules.description: Manages event-driven notifications through provider plugins (email, SMS, push). Handles notification templates and delivery tracking.

modules.name: tax
modules.description: Calculates taxes for cart items and shipping using tax providers. Manages tax regions, rates, and overrides.

modules.name: currency
modules.description: Manages supported currencies and exchange rate data. Provides currency formatting and conversion utilities.

modules.name: sales-channel
modules.description: Manages sales channels (web, mobile, POS, marketplace) and controls product availability per channel.

modules.name: api-key
modules.description: Manages publishable and secret API keys for authenticating storefront and admin API requests.

modules.name: stock-location
modules.description: Manages physical stock locations (warehouses, stores) and their addresses. Links to inventory and fulfillment modules.

modules.name: workflow
modules.description: Orchestrates multi-step business processes using durable workflow engine. Manages compensation (rollback) logic and step retries.
